Title: RSU Freshman Orientation
ReviewOrGuideText: The orientation was informative and helped me understand campus facilities. The registration process was smooth.

Title: ICT Coding Workshop
ReviewOrGuideText: The workshop covered practical programming skills. More hands-on activities would make it even better.

Title: How to Register for Campus Events
ReviewOrGuideText: Log in using your student account, select the event, and click Register before the deadline.

Title: International Cultural Festival
ReviewOrGuideText: A great opportunity to experience different cultures and make new friends.

Title: Career Fair 2026
ReviewOrGuideText: Many companies participated and provided internship opportunities.

Title: Finding Events by Category
ReviewOrGuideText: Use the search filter to browse workshops, sports, seminars, competitions, and club activities.

Title: Badminton Friendly Match
ReviewOrGuideText: Well organized event with friendly participants. Equipment was provided.

Title: Entrepreneurship Seminar
ReviewOrGuideText: The guest speaker shared useful startup experiences and answered questions.

Title: Receiving Event Notifications
ReviewOrGuideText: Enable notifications in your profile settings to receive reminders before events begin.

Title: Photography Competition
ReviewOrGuideText: Creative event with clear judging criteria and attractive prizes.

Title: Volunteer Blood Donation
ReviewOrGuideText: The staff explained the process clearly and the event was well managed.

Title: Using the Event Calendar
ReviewOrGuideText: The calendar displays upcoming events by date, making planning much easier.

Title: English Conversation Club
ReviewOrGuideText: Friendly environment for practicing English with local and international students.

Title: AI and Technology Talk
ReviewOrGuideText: Interesting discussion on artificial intelligence and future careers.

Title: Checking Registration Status
ReviewOrGuideText: Visit My Registrations to check whether your registration is confirmed or pending.

Title: Music Club Auditions
ReviewOrGuideText: Fun atmosphere and welcoming club members encouraged new students to join.

Title: Hackathon 2026
ReviewOrGuideText: Excellent teamwork experience with challenging programming tasks.

Title: Searching Events by Keyword
ReviewOrGuideText: Search using event titles, organizers, or keywords to quickly find activities.

Title: Environmental Awareness Campaign
ReviewOrGuideText: Educational booths encouraged recycling and sustainable practices.

Title: Campus Movie Night
ReviewOrGuideText: A relaxing event with free snacks and a friendly atmosphere.

Title: Submitting a New Event
ReviewOrGuideText: Complete the event form, upload a poster, and submit for administrator approval.

Title: Science Exhibition
ReviewOrGuideText: Interesting student projects with interactive demonstrations.

Title: Food Festival
ReviewOrGuideText: A wide variety of international food stalls with live performances.

Title: Event Reminder Settings
ReviewOrGuideText: Choose to receive reminders one day or one hour before the event starts.

Title: Leadership Training
ReviewOrGuideText: The activities improved teamwork and communication skills.

Title: Sports Day Opening Ceremony
ReviewOrGuideText: The opening ceremony was energetic with performances from different faculties.

Title: Joining Student Clubs
ReviewOrGuideText: Browse available clubs, attend the club fair, and register through the Event Hub.

Title: Startup Pitch Competition
ReviewOrGuideText: Creative startup ideas with valuable feedback from judges.

Title: International Friendship Day
ReviewOrGuideText: Excellent opportunity to meet students from different countries.

Title: Viewing Event History
ReviewOrGuideText: Users can review previously attended events and download participation certificates if available.
